sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n41739" key="e)piwniko\n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπῐωνικὸν</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μέτρον,</foreign> metre in which lonics are combined with iambi, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:14:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14.3</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2054.tlg001:1:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.28</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
